ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the disease belongs to */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms associated with the disease */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diseases_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "read_codes" (
  "read_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read code */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the read code is associated with */,
  "read_code" TEXT /* The read code itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the read code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the read code is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("read_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_read_codes_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "med_codes" (
  "med_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical code */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the medical code is associated with */,
  "med_code" INTEGER /* The medical code itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the medical code is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_med_codes_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the diagnosis is for */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the diagnosis is for */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnosis */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis the treatment is for */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions for the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_read_codes" (
  "patient_read_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-read code pair */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the read code is for */,
  "read_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the read code */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the read code was recorded for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_read_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_read_codes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_read_codes_read_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("read_code_id") REFERENCES read_codes ("read_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_med_codes" (
  "patient_med_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-med code pair */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medical code is for */,
  "med_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical code */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the medical code was recorded for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_med_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_med_codes_med_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_code_id") REFERENCES med_codes ("med_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_med_codes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "hcp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare professional */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare professional */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare professional */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the healthcare professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment is for */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* The message itself */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been read */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_sharing" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was shared */,
  "document" TEXT /* The document itself */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_sharing_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_sharing_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patient, healthcare professional) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
